verdict: A fun, well-paced chart that matches the upbeat energy of the song, but holds back its quality with a physically impossible three-panel overlap near the end.

issues.problem: Requires tapping L while both R (held 76.480 to 77.892) and D (held 77.186 to 77.892) are actively held, forcing an impossible 3-panel overlap for a Medium singles chart.
The rapid eighth-note sequence (U -> R -> D) at 170 BPM is a sudden spike in difficulty compared to the rest of the chart's comfortable quarter-note stream.
